content.text:
<user_query>

Explore the directory structure and contents of these directories:
1. ~/.cursor/skills/ ‚Äî list all subdirectories and their SKILL.md files
2. ~/.cursor/commands/ ‚Äî list contents if it exists
3. ~/.cursor/scripts/ ‚Äî list contents if it exists

For each skill directory found, just report the directory name and a one-line summary of what SKILL.md says. Report the full directory tree for commands/ and scripts/.
</user_query>

Report:

---

## 1. ~/.cursor/skills/

**Subdirectories and SKILL.md summaries:**

| Directory | One-line summary |
|-----------|------------------|
| `deploy-fuyao` | Deterministic Fuyao deployment flow with validation, branch sync, and confirmation |
| `sweep-fuyao` | Deterministic dispatch and verification of Fuyao hyperparameter sweeps |
| `policy-lineage-tracker` | Interactive agent for policy lineage experiment tracking; parses requests, gathers context, calls tracker CLI |
| `motion-rl-isaacgym-exec` | Runs shell commands inside the isaacgym container for the Motion RL workspace |
| `fuyao-job-manager` | Manages Fuyao jobs after dispatch: cancel, status, pull artifacts from OSS, query FFF, manage job registry |
| `resolve-linter-errors` | Fixes linter errors in the current file or across the repo |
| `reward-design-analyzer` | Analyzes RL reward design for tasks: config inheritance, reward terms, importance, disturbances, Markdown report |
| `plotjuggler-udp-fuzzy` | Generates/updates PlotJuggler layout and streaming XML from UDP JSON signals; fuzzy-to-exact signal mapping |

**Additional files in skills:**
- `motion-rl-isaacgym-exec/scripts/run-in-isaacgym-motion-rl.sh`
- `plotjuggler-udp-fuzzy/scripts/match_udp_signals.py`
- `plotjuggler-udp-fuzzy/reference.md`

---

## 2. ~/.cursor/skills-cursor/

| Directory | One-line summary |
|-----------|------------------|
| `update-cursor-settings` | Modifies Cursor/VSCode user settings in settings.json |
| `shell` | Runs the rest of a /shell request as a literal shell command |
| `migrate-to-skills` | Converts Cursor rules and slash commands to Agent Skills format |
| `create-subagent` | Creates custom subagents for specialized AI tasks |
| `create-skill` | Guides creation of Agent Skills for Cursor |
| `create-rule` | Creates Cursor rules for persistent AI guidance |

---

## 3. ~/.cursor/commands/

```
commands/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ sync-toolbox.md
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ deploy-fuyao.md

‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ play-motion-rl.md
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ restart-isaacgym.md
```

---
